hero.headline: Stop Losing Revenue You've Already Earned
hero.subhead: The Revenue Architect identifies the hidden leaks in your business and builds systems to fix them — turning chaos into predictable growth.

ideology.title: The 5-Stage Revenue Journey
ideology.description: Every business operates somewhere on this map. The question isn't where you are — it's how fast you can move forward.

stages.name: Awareness
stages.description: Your market doesn't know you exist. You're invisible to the people who need you most.

stages.name: Acquisition
stages.description: People know you, but they're not buying. Your funnel has holes you can't see.

stages.name: Activation
stages.description: They bought once, but never came back. First impressions are everything.

stages.name: Revenue
stages.description: Money is coming in, but you're leaving more on the table than you realize.

stages.name: Retention
stages.description: Growth is real and repeatable. Your systems run while you sleep.

case_studies.description: Revenue increase in 90 days by fixing Stage 2-3 leaks
Recovered annual revenue from retention system rebuild
From chaos to predictable pipeline with Revenue Journey mapping

about.title: The Architect
about.name: Richard Norwood
about.bio: I've spent 15+ years in the trenches of revenue optimization — from Fortune 500 consulting to building my own businesses from zero. I don't teach theory. I build systems that print money.
